purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 14: Data Handling
description: Videos covering: counting and sorting objects, comparison vocabulary (more, less, most, least), and reading numbers on a number line

videos.title: Counting and Sorting Objects | Sorting into Groups
videos.description: Learn how to count objects and sort them into groups by colour, shape, or size. Sorting is the first step to organising data!
learningObjectives: Understand that sorting helps us organise information

videos.title: More, Less, Most, Least | Comparison Words for Kids
videos.description: Learn the words we use to compare groups: more, fewer, most, least, equal. These words help us describe and compare data!
learningObjectives: Use words like more, fewer, most, and least correctly
Determine which group has more or fewer items
followUpTopics: Reading data from tables and graphs

videos.title: Reading Numbers on a Number Line | Numbers Up to 100
videos.description: Learn how to read and find numbers on a number line. See how numbers go up by 1s, 2s, 5s, and 10s. This helps when we read scales on graphs!
learningObjectives: Read numbers on a number line
Understand how scales work on graphs

usageNotes.purpose: Review counting and sorting, comparison vocabulary, and number reading before learning data handling in Chapter 14
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Counting and sorting → Comparison vocabulary → Reading numbers on a number line
